Refactor notification preference write handlers so the generic route and the existing email/SMS routes follow the same owner-only, delegated-session, audit, and FORBIDDEN-error conventions. Follow the repository conventions you discover. Apply the change directly in code instead of only describing it. Do not run npm install, npm test, or any shell commands. Inspect and edit files only.
